description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark gray exterior and white trim, featuring multiple large windows arranged in neat rows. The front yard includes a driveway with a parked car, a small garden with a flowering tree, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The backyard is enclosed by a hedge and contains a hot tub, outdoor seating, and a dining area. The house has a flat roof and a balcony area on the upper floor, with visible interior rooms painted in light blue, yellow, and neutral tones. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch and steps, and the windows are symmetrically distributed across the facade. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with functional outdoor spaces and a clear separation between public and private areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gray facade, white trim, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring a driveway, garden, and backyard leisure area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entrance, garden with a flowering tree, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow-walled room, balcony, and the extension of the house with additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a hot tub, outdoor dining area, and hedge enclosure, as well as the back windows and patio doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, garden, and the rear patio area with outdoor furniture and hedge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single door, flanked by windows and a garden with decorative elements.
